scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web "corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-server dev" "corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-web dev"
scripts.build: corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-server build && corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-web build
scripts.type-check: corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-server type-check && corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-web type-check
scripts.clean: corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-server clean && corepack yarn workspace @next/mock-admin-mall-tenant-console-web clean
